summary:
FUTURE ELECTIONS AND SOCIETAL SHIFTS: Brandon claims to have experienced visions of future political outcomes, specifically mentioning the 2026 elections. He states that without increased prayer, there will be a blue wave and a stalemate presidency. He also discusses recent political developments in New York and describes seeing a mass migration of people moving out of northern areas toward the south in search of a new life and spiritual revival.

SPIRITUAL REVIVALS AND PRAYER: Brandon asserts that major spiritual awakenings are emerging globally, comparing them to historical events like the Azusa Street and Welsh revivals. He specifically identifies Minneapolis, Minnesota, as a focal point for this impending revival, emphasizing that these movements are entirely dependent on sustained intercessory prayer.

CATASTROPHIC EVENTS AND PROPHECIES: Brandon recounts recent aviation accidents and bomb threats, connecting them to warnings of a sudden global shaking. He references prophecies made by Oral Roberts in 2004 regarding a major transformative event. Brandon explicitly dismisses the idea that an asteroid named Atlas is the cause, stating instead that a different, highly disruptive event will occur.

NATIONAL SECURITY THREATS AND DECEPTIONS: Brandon states he has seen a new, undetectable terrorist device being developed that will bypass Homeland Security. He advises vigilance for major televised gatherings, including the Super Bowl, the Olympics, and the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade. Furthermore, Brandon claims that a false alien invasion will be staged on television, featuring a tall demonic entity intended to deceive the public.

OCCULT ACTIVITIES AND GLOBAL CEREMONIES: Brandon describes a vision involving an obsidian knife used for sacrifices in Berlin. He claims that global events, specifically the opening ceremonies of the Olympics, are being used for demonic summonings.

SPECIFIC VISIONS OF NEW YORK CITY: Brandon details a vision of a tall, mirrored glass building catching fire in New York City. He describes the location as being between the Hudson River and Central Park, with the top floor engulfed in flames. He also mentions seeing trash barges on the nearby rivers, comparing the visual atmosphere to events in Gaza.

INTERNATIONAL ECONOMICS AND GEOPOLITICS: Brandon outlines future geopolitical and financial shifts, stating that South Korea and Japan will become major hubs for cryptocurrency reserves, referring to them as the Sooners. He describes a vision of a tilled field in Japan growing golden crypto coins. Additionally, he claims there will be regime change attempts in Venezuela and Iraq, specifically linking their oil reserves to the hydrocarbon law, BRICS integration, and future economic wealth transfers.
rawData: [November 05, 2025]-[Plane crashes and the Democrats won - what next]-[https://youtu.be/btBCeTHs7Qg]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining me again tonight. I'm going to go over some things and pray real quick with y'all. I'll make it short for you. You know, there's a lot of people disappointed about New York. And you know what? The sky is not falling chicken little kind of for what I've seen. I don't mean to be negative, but I'm just trying to tell you all a great shaking is coming, like I've warned you. And in the great shaking that's coming, we will have the greatest, glorious church rise out of a shaking. I've warned you even about midterms of next year. I saw it back in August when I went into the future and the Lord allowed me to go into 2026, 2027, 2028 and I saw the outcome of the election of 2026 and the Lord said if the church doesn't rise up and pray and do what they did in 2024, for the election last year, it will not be a red wave. You will see a blue wave and you will see a stalemate presidency. And the Lord said this we would lose the Senate. But he said if the church didn't get out and vote, well that of course, but right now it's more than that. It's prayer and intercession for the ungodly. Look what they did in New York today. We have a man that is a communist in my opinion. It's a sad day for New York in my opinion because of what I've seen coming. But not sad in the part where you go, 'Oh no, everything's over.' I'm just trying to be real with y'all. A shaking to awaken. And I saw a mass migration of people leaving. I saw people saying it's not safe anymore. We got to get out of here. I saw people packing up and moving south. I saw a lot of people leaving New Jersey and the areas over that New York City and all that and they were moving down south trying to find a new life. They are moving for the revival and they don't even realize it because there's hot spots for the revival. And what did I tell you? Some places in the United States would experience revival more than others. Similar to Azusa Street when you had to go to Azusa Street in California. You didn't just stay in Oklahoma and say, 'I want to be a part of Azusa Street.' You had to pick up your stuff and go. So, they went and people that were hungry went on trains or whatever they could do to go to Azusa Street. So I have seen Azusa Streets breaking out all over America, all over the world. And the Lord showed me Minneapolis, Minnesota with Living Word church there with Lyn Hammond and her kids. And I saw a major revival breaking out in these areas, but they were cultivated out of prayer. Every major revival starts with prayer. Every revival. If you look at Azusa Street, it started with prayer. William Seymour, they started with prayer. I've said this over and over. Pensacola with John Kilpatrick started with prayer. Two years of intercessory prayer. And so on and so on. The Welsh revival, all of you. Everything is always birthed out of prayer. Prayer, prayer, prayer. It's the foundation for everything. And that is why I believe the Lord Jesus said, 'Brendan, I want you to go on YouTube and create a prayer army, raise up men and women that will pray for the end time church and for this last revival, for the move of God that's about to take place.' And I believe that's what we're here to do even tonight is to pray. I know we see the darkness and we see things happening like right now. We see the plane and UPS or whatever happened. That was terrible with that wing of that plane and it ignited and I don't even know why it did all that, but for what my son showed me, that was a very bad incident that happened today. Does anybody see that? Let's play that real quick. They can see that. You got it? It looks like it was already on fire when he was trying to take off. So, I don't know why he was even trying to take off, but he went somewhere. He's with Jesus or wherever. But that is very, very sad and tragic for that family. Sorry, I forget, you got to filter things better, Brendan. But you know, it's a sad situation there. And so, there was all kinds of bomb threats and everything else happened today. I want to go over yesterday's video. I believe there was some confusion at the beginning of everybody thinking that I'm saying the Atlas is this event that's taking place or that Oral Roberts, that's not it, what I was seeing in the spirit and then I relayed it again at the end of the video that I said I do not believe that Atlas will turn out to be anything. I don't believe that this is the major event that Oral Roberts was seeing in the spirit. And I have it right here if you want to listen to it again. I think it's kind of redundant to go over things again, but I made the video again to make it clear what I was trying to tell you all that another major event, the Lord gave us the word last night that another major event, another major shaking that is similar, something that's attached to this Atlas, something to what we're about to see that is a shaking to awaken. that he said, 'Fearful sights you will see that will bring you to your knee.' And the Lord said, 'Go back and look at the word from brother Oral Roberts, evangelist Oral Roberts, and what he prophesied back in 2004.' So, we did and we played the little clip about the fire and all the things that he saw in the spirit. It was such a visitation that he had from the Lord that shook him and he was not able to see what it was. You know what? Because he went home before. But 20-some years later, here we are and the Lord's bringing it up again and he's stirring. I felt so much fire in my stomach last night when I was talking about that. I felt like I had something whipping something. It was stirring. I could feel it just stirring inside of me like a locomotive just stirring whenever the Lord said speak this out and tell them a major shaking. Everything that we ever have seen, everything that we've ever known is going to change within 24 hours. He keeps talking about major changes coming to this world. A major shaking. But he said it would. He said this would be a sign to the nations that the second coming of the Lord Jesus Christ is at hand. That it would shake the people and bring them to their knees and there would be a major revival break forth out of this people going back to church. And that's what the Lord said. They're coming back to church. But what will they get when they get there? Will they get the stale word that you've been feeding them, preachers? Will they get the stale, dried up word that you've been feeding the people and they're anemic and dying spiritually because you feed them a lukewarm gospel? Or are they going to get the Holy Ghost and fire? That's what I want to ask you preachers because right now the fruit of where we are in this nation is on your shoulders. Because where we are as a nation is because the church doesn't have a backbone preaching the truth telling people that Jesus Christ is coming and that they're going to hell if they don't repent and change from their wicked ways. It's the church's fault. We are griping about the fruit of an election in New York. But we need to gripe about the root. And the root is the church is not doing what it's supposed to be doing. Preaching and teaching people how to live righteous and holy. But we give them skinny jeans and fog machines 30 minute little sermon. Make sure you take up your offering because that's the most important thing to a lot of you. Then you go up and you take your offering. You got your little bitty sermonette and you got your little bitty Holy Ghost worship with your lights and all your stuff and then you send them on their way and they're still starving spiritually. And that's the problem with America. I get so persecuted because I have a two-hour prayer service because people go, "Brandon, I got other things I'm doing in my life. We don't have time to pray." "How come you see so much, Brandon? How come God comes and visits you, Brandon?" Because I spend time with him. Well, it's more than a two-hour little time a day, I can assure you that. And most people go, "Well, I've got things." Do you not think I got things going on in my life? Everybody has a 24-hour day and a 7-day work week. I got to make money just like you do, but there's priorities. Just like there is a guy that goes to the gym that works out twice a day and looks buff and looks good, I go to the spiritual gym. I may not go to the physical gym, as you can see, but I'm going to tell you: I go to the spiritual gym. And I intercede for most of you all the time. Seeing what I see, having an impartation, and having Jesus come and visit you in your house doesn't come from 10 minutes of prayer. They go, "Well, you know, Brandon, I just wish you'd cut your things down." I'm trying to teach you. I'm trying to teach you how to get there, and you're never going to make it for what's coming. The Lord said, "Go on YouTube and tell my people and teach them how to pray. Teach them how to seek me, Brandon, and they'll find me. Teach them how to knock and the door will be opened." But the way they're being taught right now by the church—the seeker-friendlies—they're never going to make it for what's coming: the great falling away. Many of you will curse God in the days ahead. You'll blame him and say, "I turned my back on him. I never knew him." Just like when the rooster crowed and he said, "I don't know him. I don't know him." How many times you'll be just like him when persecution comes? I told you: like olives, you're going to go through the olive press. Many of you in Canada, Australia, and these areas, you don't understand what's coming. You feel that it's just status quo, but I've warned you and warned you. You're a frog in a pot and the water's beginning to boil around you and you don't even know it. Am I totally ready for it? No. But I'm a lot further along than a lot of you. You say, "Why do you keep saying the same things over?" Because that's what I'm instructed to do. Just like Jeremiah, I don't know when to say what I say, but the Lord said, "Go on and tell them again." They must be ready for what's coming. "But the rapture is coming, brother! We're not going to experience any of this!" You are so blind. I believe in the rapture of the church more than a lot of you do. I've seen the Lord and I've talked to him face to face. And I'm telling you, he said, "Brandon, this is the beginning of sorrows. A great shaking's coming. I don't want that anyone should perish, but all come to repentance." Where are they at right now? They're all asleep. You must tell them. He was so frustrated—from what I felt. I don't want to say the Lord was frustrated, but that's what I could perceive in me, because the Lord doesn't get angry like that. When we're talking, I can see the compassion in his eyes. I wouldn't say it's frustration, but saying the church is asleep. "Brandon, go on and tell them again," just like it was with Lot. "I come and visit my friends. I'm looking for a friend." I told you all that. Remember that day? "I'm looking for a friend. The eyes of the Lord are running to and fro throughout the whole world, looking for a heart who's perfect toward him. Looking for a heart that just wants to be his friend, that's yielded and says, 'God, here am I. I just want to talk to you. No agenda.'" I don't have anything; I just want to talk to you without looking at my watch every five minutes because prayer is boring. I get lost in prayer like I do on this channel. I don't look at it as a task; I look at it as an honor. Like tonight, I was out and I was putting some lights in my tree because I like to look at my tree. And he said, "Are you going to go pray tonight? Brandon, would you go do prayer tonight for me? Don't tell my people; go do prayer." And I said, "Okay, Father." I already had told Diana, "I'm not doing prayer tonight." I was frustrated with the comment section and what Braden was telling me about things today. I said, "I need a break, son. They don't get it." When he relays to me what's going on, he says, "This is what's happening, Daddy." I said, "I need a break today. I need to stay outside and just talk to the Father." And he came to me. He's so gentle. I was tweaking my little light and he said, "Brandon, will you do me a favor? Will you go pray with the people?" I looked at Braden, who was sitting beside me, and I said, "You know what? He just asked." He goes, "Yeah, Dad. I've already got the lights set up." Because he knew what the Father was going to ask, because we know his pattern. We know his tugs. You become familiar with him. And he says, "I just want you to pray. Could you just lead them in prayer tonight?" "Yeah, Dad, I'll do it for you." The heart is heavy concerning New York, the planes, and what I saw last night. After what I saw about the terrorist attacks coming to America, they're about to implement some kind of a device they've been working on that will not be able to be detected by dogs or X-ray machines. They have it perfected. I can't tell you how I saw it happen. All I can tell you is there is a device that has been made and perfected, and they're waiting to test it. It will not be detected by Homeland Security, X-ray machines, or dogs. They have spent millions of dollars perfecting something that cannot be detected. Most of you have no clue what's in our country. I tell you this to call you to pray, not to fear. You don't realize the grace that God has spared us so far and how he's protected us and protected our president by his hand, his mercy, and his grace every single day. He protects Donald Trump, he protects our judges, and he protects you. Many of you don't realize how many near-death experiences you've almost had every single day, and God has spared you and you don't even realize it. You wake up every single day and the hand of God is on you. But I'm telling you this because I've seen a great shaking coming again and again. Most people are so focused on this Atlas. They're all fascinated by a rock coming, traveling really fast, and you've got all these people talking about it. It's on all the shows, NASA's talking about it, you've got Fox News. "What is this thing? It's moving faster." It's all such great distractions. What's coming is the size of Manhattan. If it hits the Earth, we're done; we're like the dinosaurs. There will be nothing left. So we know that is not going to happen because it doesn't line up with the Word. It's not Apophis or whatever you want to call wormwood. Whatever this is, I told you there's going to be a false alien invasion—like a mothership with an actual demonic thing talking on the TV. It's coming, and the Lord said many people will believe it. Even if it was possible, the elect will be deceived. Watch what I'm telling you, it will come eventually. They will interview this thing that looks like a stick creature that's 12-foot-tall on TV. I've seen it; I watched the lady interview it in the spirit when I was praying. She holds the mic up to it and they're talking, and everybody's fascinated with this creature that's going to talk. And the Lord said, 'If you can entertain angels unaware, you can entertain demonic stuff unaware, entertain demonic demons and everything unawares.' I warn you about these things that are coming. But what Oral Roberts saw, I had forgotten about it until last night. And the Lord said, 'Brandon, this is coming.' I'm bringing a sign for this generation, for a shaking to awaken—not just for the church, but for the world—a sign of the second coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. So when you hear about things like I'm talking about, you need to pray for the Super Bowl, the Olympics, massive gatherings, the Rockefeller Christmas lighting, the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade, the New York Times Square ball drop on New Year's Eve—major gatherings that are televised. Pray for our nation, for we have an enemy within, a Red Dawn experience. I said most of you say it's terrorists; no, it's an invasion from another country. I try to tell you over and over again. That's what we'll pray tonight and continue to pray. I don't give up; I pray and I pray. They said, 'Well, since we lost the election in New York, I refuse to pray anymore.' Well, that's the ticket; that's a great attitude. What? Let's give up on prayer because we're praying for the fruit whenever the root's the problem? And you're mad whenever the fruit doesn't turn out the way you want it to because the preachers aren't preaching the truth. We go, 'Well, let's just give up on prayer.' It's not the Lord's fault because you preach a lukewarm gospel. As the church goes, so goes the world. We are the salt and the light. It's not the world's fault it's dumb; it's the church that has to teach them and preach the truth. How will they hear the word unless a preacher is sent? That's even scripture. I don't remember exactly how it goes, but how will they hear it unless someone is sent? It's about the preachers preaching the truth. I say all that because it's on my heart going into this holiday season—praying over the FAA and the baggage claims, praying over the flights over Thanksgiving. We must have our government opened up. The Lord said, 'You have a sliver.' Remember what I told you all? He said, 'I'm giving you a sliver.' Back then, it was around Halloween, Darren, before the 31st, before the first, before the snap was, right? He said, 'I'm giving you a little sliver. There's a little sliver; you can push this through.' Do you know what that meant to me? This is going to require work; you're going to have to contend. I know when He's saying that; He didn't say, 'I've got this.' You see, you must push. You can push it. You have a little bit right here. You can sway these seven. There's seven you can sway. You're working on people's hearts. You cannot force them to do what you want them to do; they have free will. But you can pray for a softness of their heart. Father, I call for softness. If you try to manipulate somebody, it's witchcraft. You can't force somebody to do what you want them to do. I had so many people say, 'I want you to pray that this woman will love me.' They sent me a picture of her and everything. They said they had Perry Stone pray over her and all these others. 'This woman, I just know she's my wife.' You've dated her for four months, but you want me to pray some kind of weird prayer over her so you'll get married and have kids together? She doesn't want to be with you, but you want me to pray for her will to change whenever you hardly know her? People send me stuff and I just go, 'That's the state of the church.' I go, 'This isn't even biblical. Are y'all serious? You want me to manipulate somebody in the spirit realm for you so you can be married to her?' I'm like, 'You can't do that to somebody; that's demonic.' You've got people doing occultic stuff thinking it's Christianity, and it's not. It's flaky. And you go, 'No, you're not going to.' If Diana said tomorrow—I pray for her—'I don't want to be married to you anymore,' I'd say, 'I pray for your heart, babe. We've been married for a long time.' You know what I'm saying? But you can't go over there and just start beating on somebody and saying, 'Well, you're going to believe—this is what the Word says.' If they don't want to live the Christian life anymore, they don't have to. It's free will; God gave every single one of us free will. But I pray for them to change. Pray for the softness of their heart that the blinders would come off, because for a lot of us, it's a demonic spirit messing with people. We wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against principalities and powers, spiritual wickedness in high places. It's demonic spirits that are messing with folks like the guy in New York. So, Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi... people say, 'You pick on the Democrats a lot.' Yeah, because there's a lot of demonic Democrats. Yeah, there's a lot of demonic Republicans. I just call it what it is. I tried to stay neutral in all this, but I see people and what they believe and what they stand for, and I go, 'Y'all, they don't have Jesus.' None of them do. There's not a lot of Republicans that do. I pray Donald Trump does, quite frankly, as he dropped the F-bomb all the time. I go, 'God help him; he needs to have an awakening unto God.' Not that people don't say bad words, but you certainly don't say it behind a pulpit in public like that—dropping the F-bomb all the time. The Lord said he was going to have a road to Damascus experience and he was going to be shaken to awaken. The Lord said a major fire was going to hit this man and the glory of the Lord was going to use him. He would be baptized in the Holy Ghost. The Lord said this stuff not just through me, but through Kim Clement and others. I believe with all my heart that Don Jr. and Eric Jr. are going to be amazing preachers for the Lord—end-time funders of the gospel. God's anointed them for finances. I believe that God's going to use them; we need people like that, like the Greens and the Hobby Lobbies, to do this stuff. Okay, there's 30 minutes. My son rolled his eyes. I love you, B. I thought you... because they go, 'There he goes again.' No. So, okay. Well, let's pray together real quick. I was waiting to see if Diana was going to come in here. Hold on just a second. Please don't leave, y'all. I'll try to entertain them. He was looking into this; y'all sent this last night. Where is it? Don't leave, y'all. Okay, don't leave. But he said this looks like the stuff that was in his vision. Somebody sent this to us, and it looks very similar. So, thank you to whoever sent that to us. We might talk about it later. We'll just do this tonight, don't worry about it. I came back as fast as I could. Tomorrow is good. Let's pray. Father, we just thank you for your blood, for your body that was broken for us. Was there any other articles you wanted to show me? That knife? You want to show them that? That's the thing that I saw. I just showed them. That was the thing I saw in the spirit that they were using what I saw them making these sacrifices in Berlin. And the Lord told me that obsidian knife, whatever it is, was demonic. It's a demonic device, some kind of weapon. I don't know, but that's what they're doing for the Olympics there. There's something about the Olympics and the opening ceremony. The Lord said, 'Pray into that.' I said, 'What is it?' He said, 'Watch what they do.' They're summoning things. Do you understand? That's whenever I said those devils in hell were looking, and they know that the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ is at hand. They even know there's an urgency in the kingdom of darkness. They know that Jesus Christ is coming. How much more should his church be ready? If the devil in hell knows that his time is short, how much more should the body of Christ have an urgency inside of them? If you spend time with him, you'll have an urgency because that's what he's warning. It's like an alarm, like those traffic lights when you're driving and it's flashing: Stop! Warning! That's where we are right now in the realm of the spirit. He's warning us. A major something is about to happen. The coming of the Lord Jesus Christ is at hand. And even the devils in hell know, people. Most people are, like I said, status quo; they have their head in the sand. But not on this channel. I hope I shake you. I hope I stir you. I hope you get ready and prepared to pray, and I'm excited you're here. For the newcomers, there's so many new faces. I think we grew another thousand subscribers in the last couple days. They're coming from everywhere. Our X account has grown substantially. Braden said, 'Dad, X is taking off over there,' and so he's really trying to promote X because he's trying to build a second platform. If anything happened over here, we'd have a backup. We have an X account and our YouTube, because I say things over here, but you can say a lot more over there and not get in trouble like I can over here. I have to really watch what I say. So, it's awesome to have that. I'm going to start going live on my X account, probably this week or next week; he's trying to get me all set up. So all glory to Jesus that everybody's finding me and I'm excited about it. X is taking off for us. Facebook took off a little bit here and there. I just cannot stand Facebook, and I cannot stand Instagram or TikTok. I have over 300,000 followers on TikTok and I'm like, where are all these young people coming from? It's crazy. Father, I thank you for the body. I thank you for what you're doing for us in these last days. You've not given up on us. You never left us and you never forsake us. Father, you said we're the closers. I thank you, Lord, that we don't disappoint, that we're people that when you look at us, you say, 'I'm so pleased with them. Well done, Brandon. Well done, Diana. Well done, crowd. You all did it. You went all in. You were hungry. You were thirsty. You went after me. You found me.' Not only that, but you told the world that I was coming and you didn't sit idly by, just on a park bench waiting for things. We sought him and we found him. Father, I thank you for this body that was broken for us. You died for us and you rose again on the third day. I'm so grateful, Father, that you healed us and you've made us whole. You took all that on the cross according to Galatians, that Christ has redeemed us from the curse of the law. I'm so grateful, Father, that by your stripes, we're healed. Father, we take this body in the name of Jesus. We are so grateful for it. Amen. Lord, we take the blood and we apply the blood. I apply the blood tonight as I pray. I thank you, Lord, that if there's anything you want to show me, Father, I yield to you uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. I plead the blood over my spiritual eyes so there's no demonic spirits that bother me. I plead the blood all around me and I send angels around me. I thank you that I hear your voice, and a stranger's voice I shall not follow. I apply the blood of Jesus over Diana, Braden, Megan, Paisley, over our finances, our house, our car, everything, God, that you bless us with. I apply the blood over us. I thank you, Father, that the footsteps of the righteous are ordered of the Lord. We thank you, Lord, for tonight's prayer, that we are led by your spirit. We're expecting to touch the hem of your garment. Every single time we touch that hem, we make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of us. We apply the blood right now in Jesus' name. Thank you. Forgive us of our sins. He's such a good God. Amen. Lord, we take the blood. 500 turned away that fast from communion. That's incredible. Father, we worship you. You don't have to update me anymore, Braden; that's good. Father, I thank you that you open the eyes of our heart. I want to see you. Open the eyes of our heart, Lord. I want to see you. Instantaneously, I hear the Lord say, 'Angelic visitation.' Angels unawares. Angelic aid and assistance on another level that we've never experienced before in this generation or any generation prior. He's sending his angelic aid and assistance on this generation. He said, 'I remember on the edge of heaven when I said I'm sending them.' There'll be two per person concerning the lost souls to help bring in the harvest. It was a covering over the people. Father, I thank you for the angelic armies. I thank you for the angelic host, the warring angels, the archangels warring on our behalf. Father, they helped pave the way and the harvesting equipment when you showed me the Lord of the harvest. When I saw the harvesting equipment in the barn and you said the anointing and the glory and the outpouring of my spirit, he said, 'Brandon, I filled my barn. That barn is full. The silos are full, ready for the harvest.' The harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. I saw the harvest equipment. It was the glory of the Lord. The angels are paving the way and the wheat was touching down and it was swaying in the distance. I could see it as he held his hand. I could see the holes in his hand, and he held out his hands before me and said, 'Brandon, will you help me bring in my harvest?' He had overalls on, an old straw hat, a piece of straw, and wheat in his mouth. He said, 'I'm the harvester.' Those hands had huge holes, the size of half dollars inside of his hands. He had them in his feet. And the glory. I could see the wheat swaying behind him, the massive hole in his hand. He said, "Would you help me bring in my harvest? I'm sending the angel armies to war in your behalf." The harvest was plentiful, but the laborers are few. And now again, he brings up the angels to me. We're about to experience the supernatural like you wouldn't believe. You're about to experience the supernatural, church. The ones that are hungry and the ones that are thirsty, the ones that are seeking him, you're about to experience the supernatural where it will become sweatless. Where it seems that you toil and toil and you see nothing in the natural and you get weary in well-doing. The Lord shows me that what we're about to experience will be like—I heard even Brother Hagin—that it will be as easy for a bird to fly in the air and a fish to swim in the water to tap into this as easy as it is for you to take a breath.
